message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have your account ending in ****1184 with a current amount due of 8400. Please confirm identity by providing the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last two digits are 02, but I still can’t make any payment right now.
Understood. I will note hardship and no capacity to pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I still can’t make any payment.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.
Handoff

structured_payload.summary: Disclosure completed: AI agent acting on behalf of Slice; conversation logged. Identity verified using last 2 digits of phone number on file. Debt established: Slice loan, masked account ****1184, amount due 8400. Borrower stated they cannot make any payment now and do not expect any income within 21 days. Hardship signal recorded: no income / ongoing hardship. Required assessment question asked and answered; no further assessment questions required. Next stage should not repeat disclosure, identity verification, or hardship timing question. Next priority: review for hardship/next-step routing by phone.
